title: Hotel Doorman Guest House
text: Baru kali ini liburan dan nginep di hotel pelayanannya buruk banget , Reception dan staff lainnya gada sama skli senyum , dr air mineral padahal suami ngeliat di rcp ada tp gada tawarn atau disediain sampe sarapan pagi pun ga di ksh untung kita mampu beli wkkwk mngkn di korup x sama staf nya buat mnm sndri huhu kasian ya ,lanjut soal penmptn kamar udh 3x pindah kamar ada yang kamar nya tema nya serem masa anniv diksh tema ranger mana gelap , kmr ke 2 ac mati , baru deh ke 3 mndingan tema laut ac jg on ,minta req dikaca Tulisan anniv pdhl klo mereka ngikutin sesuai mau gue pengen gue kasih tips dan berbayar pun gue mampu buat bayar tp alasan gada noted diaplikasinya lah temen gue apa kabar di hotel lain itu dia bisa ko wkwk emang dasar staf nya aja pada males baca , cek in aja kita di jam /3 dan banyak yg ngantri , coba tolong pelayanan nya di perbaiki padahal kamarnya bagus bertema” , nyaman dan bersih tapi syg untuk bagian rooftop kotor dan bagian pantri kotor banyak yg karatan, fasilitas ga lengkap apa lagi staf nya aduhhh pengen gue ajak ribut syg nya di kampung orng si dan niat mau liburan , tp monmaap ni kita wisatawan jauh” dtg buat liburan bukan numpang cor doang , tolong hargain kita juga bayar bukan numpang nginep gratis , kalo ke bandung lg kapok nginep disini ..

Bahkan semua pintu kamar debu semua ketauan bgt tidak pernah dilap. Kasur ganti! Ini sudah tidak layak utk tidur manusia!

text: Pertama kali liburan di Lembang, akhirnya memutuskan nginep di sini. Coba aku review ya pengalaman nginep di costay ini. text: If you love the Victorian era, you will love this historical hotel. Antiques, Antiques, Antiques! Be prepared to have shared bathroom space with other sleeping rooms. So here's the think, the hotel is going to be cold in the winter and hot and muggy in the summer. There are definitely no modern luxuries. But that's not what someone's looking for when you stay at Hotel Blessing. You DO go for southern hospitality and a certain bed & breakfast type of vibe. Rooms are decorated as Victorian era home decor. It's quaint. It's quiet. It's beautiful. But there are a few things that cause some uncomfortableness when we are accustomed to a more modern world. Water pressure was very low in the shower, but i never ran out of hot water- so that's still a win! There's was a protruding electrical outlet right above the bathroom sink which I thought quite strange, but we just have to make good decisions... just don't use the outlet with the sink running. They do not offer a free breakfast with your room but there is a Cafe on-site to order from and it smelled amazing. Limited café hours. Shockingly low rate.
textTranslated: Jika Anda menyukai era Victoria, Anda akan menyukai hotel bersejarah ini. Barang antik, barang antik, barang antik! Bersiaplah untuk berbagi kamar mandi dengan kamar tidur lain. Jadi begini, hotel ini akan dingin di musim dingin dan panas serta lembap di musim panas. Jelas tidak ada kemewahan modern. Tapi bukan itu yang dicari seseorang saat menginap di Hotel Blessing. Tetapi ada beberapa hal yang menyebabkan sedikit ketidaknyamanan bagi kita yang terbiasa dengan dunia yang lebih modern. Tekanan air di pancuran sangat rendah, tetapi saya tidak pernah kehabisan air panas - jadi itu tetap sebuah kemenangan! Ada stopkontak listrik yang menonjol tepat di atas wastafel kamar mandi yang menurut saya cukup aneh, tetapi kita hanya perlu mengambil keputusan yang bijak... jangan gunakan stopkontak saat wastafel sedang menyala. Mereka tidak menawarkan sarapan gratis dengan kamar Anda, tetapi ada kafe di lokasi yang bisa Anda pesan dan aromanya sangat menggugah selera. Jam operasional kafe terbatas. Harganya sangat murah.
cleaned_text_for_sentiment: If you love the Victorian era, you will love this historical hotel. Antiques, Antiques, Antiques! Be prepared to have shared bathroom space with other sleeping rooms. But that's not what someone's looking for when you stay at Hotel Blessing. You DO go for southern hospitality and a certain bed & breakfast type of vibe. Rooms are decorated as Victorian era home decor. It's quaint. It's quiet. It's beautiful. But there are a few things that cause some uncomfortableness when we are accustomed to a more modern world. Water pressure was very low in the shower, but i never ran out of hot water- so that's still a win! title: The Woodbridge Inn
text: It’s a nice hotel overall - a pure B&B style where the owners literally live in the same place, cook you breakfast and the place itself is a real large house. The common area includes a dining room and a living room with a TV (a good one) and a metal fireplace which the guests aren’t allowed to use. The view on the river and the forest are nice if the weather is good. The elder gentleman who met us and let us in was very kind and nice, as well as his lady. Of course those people are really lovely and the review is not about the people but about the overall experience. There was also a lovely dog running around the house which is nice if you are dog lover but beware if you have toddlers (it was barking for example which may scary your child) or any allergy. The room was pretty small. It didn’t have a TV or a fridge. The washing basin was in the room itself instead of being located in the bathroom. Maybe other rooms have different configurations so make sure to double check. The toiletries were mediocre. The hair conditioner was just gone. The body lotion was lacking. The room had some insects flying around even though the window seemed close. The bed was small but the mattress was of high quality. The room was also nicely decorated with flowers and small pumpkins (really liked it but honestly would have preferred a body lotion). The sound insulation in the house was not good - beware if you want to have fun in the room. We heard someone doing the dishes at the ground floor from our room at the top floor. They also offered some wine and sweet baked goods in the afternoon which was great. The breakfast was good - not a lot of options but I liked what was served (omelette with sausages) and it was freshly cooked. The banana bread was great too. The stay gives you a vibe of visiting a friend and staying at their place. Overall given the price of 300 USD per night it’s a solid 3 star experience to me, close to 4 stars but not reaching it. We’ve been to hotels in similar areas with much better stuffed rooms (TV, fridge, top toiletries, even hot tubs at times), more things to do in the hotel itself, and all of that at a cheaper price. This would probably be a 5 star experience to me at 150-180 USD per night. I can recommend this place for one night if you are able to get a room at a reasonable price.
textTranslated: Secara keseluruhan, hotel ini bagus - bergaya B&B murni di mana pemiliknya benar-benar tinggal di tempat yang sama, memasak sarapan untuk Anda, dan tempatnya sendiri adalah rumah besar yang sebenarnya. Area umum meliputi ruang makan dan ruang tamu dengan TV (yang bagus) dan perapian logam yang tidak boleh digunakan oleh tamu. Pemandangan sungai dan hutan sangat indah jika cuacanya bagus. Pria tua yang menyambut kami dan mempersilakan kami masuk sangat ramah dan baik, begitu pula istrinya. Tentu saja orang-orang itu sangat menyenangkan dan ulasan ini bukan tentang orang-orangnya tetapi tentang pengalaman secara keseluruhan. Ada juga seekor anjing yang lucu berlarian di sekitar rumah yang menyenangkan jika Anda pecinta anjing, tetapi waspadalah jika Anda memiliki balita (misalnya, anjing itu menggonggong yang mungkin menakutkan anak Anda) atau memiliki alergi. Kamarnya cukup kecil. Tidak ada TV atau kulkas. Wastafel berada di dalam kamar itu sendiri, bukan di kamar mandi. Mungkin kamar lain memiliki konfigurasi yang berbeda, jadi pastikan untuk memeriksanya kembali. Perlengkapan mandi biasa saja. Kondisioner rambut sudah habis. Losion tubuh juga kurang. Kamar itu dipenuhi serangga yang beterbangan meskipun jendelanya tampak tertutup. Ranjangnya kecil tetapi kasurnya berkualitas tinggi. Kamar juga didekorasi dengan indah dengan bunga dan labu kecil (sangat menyukainya tetapi jujur ​​​​saja saya lebih suka ada losion tubuh). Isolasi suara di rumah tidak bagus - hati-hati jika Anda ingin bersenang-senang di kamar. Kami mendengar seseorang mencuci piring di lantai dasar dari kamar kami di lantai atas. Mereka juga menawarkan anggur dan kue-kue manis di sore hari yang sangat bagus. Sarapannya enak - tidak banyak pilihan tetapi saya menyukai apa yang disajikan (omelet dengan sosis) dan dimasak segar. Roti pisangnya juga enak. Penginapan ini memberi Anda nuansa seperti mengunjungi teman dan menginap di rumah mereka. Secara keseluruhan, mengingat harga 300 USD per malam, ini adalah pengalaman bintang 3 yang solid bagi saya, mendekati bintang 4 tetapi tidak mencapainya. Kami pernah menginap di hotel-hotel di area serupa dengan kamar yang jauh lebih lengkap (TV, kulkas, perlengkapan mandi kelas atas, bahkan terkadang ada jacuzzi), lebih banyak aktivitas di dalam hotel, dan semua itu dengan harga yang lebih murah. Bagi saya, ini mungkin akan menjadi pengalaman bintang 5 dengan harga 150-180 USD per malam. Saya merekomendasikan tempat ini untuk satu malam jika Anda bisa mendapatkan kamar dengan harga yang wajar.

title: The Woodbridge Inn
text: The Woodbridge Inn is phenomenal. Alyssa and her team are fabulous to work with and were there for any question I had. We went to stay there since my sister was getting married at the Woodstock Inn- being able to have our whole family at the Woodbridge was so convenient, so picturesque, a beautiful house and it was just like stepping into a Hallmark movie!! It was beautifully decorated for Christmas time with a tree and decorations all over the house! Each room was fabulous with their own bathrooms and really comfortable linens and bedding. Enjoying the house the week before Christmas was definitely a special memory that we will always remember!

Dekorasinya sangat indah untuk Natal, dengan pohon Natal dan dekorasi di seluruh rumah! Setiap kamar luar biasa, dengan kamar mandi pribadi dan seprai serta tempat tidur yang sangat nyaman. Menikmati rumah ini seminggu sebelum Natal sungguh menjadi kenangan istimewa yang akan selalu kami ingat!

title: The Woodbridge Inn
text: Nos sentimos muy bien tratados y acogidos en la casa por Amy y Gerrie. Las zonas comunes muy acogedoras y bien decoradas. La tres estrellas a la habitación es por el baño que no está a la altura del resto de la casa. Ducha tipo “cabina” (muy pequeña) y en nuestro caso lavabo minúsculo sin espacio para dejar ningún utensilio o crema. La limpieza excelente y la ropa de cama también.

text: Truly fell in LOVE with Vermont and it wouldn’t have happened without the coziest place to come “home” to for the weekend. The rooms were all decorated in their own unique way. You also can’t beat a relaxing evening in the hot tub with the stars above you listening to the river flow by. Truly a great stay!

Tak ada yang bisa mengalahkan malam yang santai di bak mandi air panas dengan bintang-bintang di atas kepala sambil mendengarkan aliran sungai. Sungguh pengalaman menginap yang luar biasa!

title: The Woodbridge Inn
text: I enjoyed my stay in this clean and well maintained Inn. Alyssa and Justin showed such attention to detail. There was a fan in my room, water glasses, and a sleep machine. title: The Woodbridge Inn
text: My husband and I really enjoyed our stay at the Inn. Alyssa and Justin were wonderful hosts, always available for questions, and had some great recommendations. And of course there was Bentley (their dog) who was always available for pets on the head! Breakfast was perfect and a highlight of the day. We especially liked the waffles with blueberry compote and homemade whipped cream and afternoon chocolate banana bread! The inn is a few minutes outside of Woodstock which was what we were looking for. The drive into town is short, beautiful, and follows a gorgeous river which runs right behind the inn. Our favorite memories were sitting in the backyard watching the river, drinking the coffee and tea that was always available, and cooking s'mores. The inn itself is a beautiful blend of antique and farmhouse modern. We enjoyed playing board games at night and there looked to be a wide variety of movies and books available. We didn't end up using the hot tub, but I can imagine how lovely it would be on a cold night. We will definitely be back and I would 100% recommend the Woodbridge Inn to anyone looking to stay in Woodstock!

Alyssa dan Justin adalah tuan rumah yang luar biasa, selalu siap menjawab pertanyaan, dan memberikan beberapa rekomendasi yang bagus. Dan tentu saja ada Bentley (anjing mereka) yang selalu siap untuk dielus kepalanya! Sarapan sangat sempurna dan menjadi sorotan hari itu. Kami sangat menyukai wafel dengan selai blueberry dan krim kocok buatan sendiri serta roti pisang cokelat di sore hari! Penginapan ini terletak beberapa menit di luar Woodstock, yang memang kami cari. Perjalanan ke kota singkat, indah, dan mengikuti sungai yang indah yang mengalir tepat di belakang penginapan. Kenangan favorit kami adalah duduk di halaman belakang sambil menonton sungai, minum kopi dan teh yang selalu tersedia, dan memanggang s'mores. Penginapan itu sendiri merupakan perpaduan indah antara barang antik dan gaya rumah pertanian modern. Kami menikmati bermain permainan papan di malam hari dan tampaknya ada berbagai macam film dan buku yang tersedia. Kami tidak sempat menggunakan jacuzzi, tetapi saya bisa membayangkan betapa menyenangkannya di malam yang dingin. Kami pasti akan kembali dan saya 100% merekomendasikan Woodbridge Inn kepada siapa pun yang ingin menginap di Woodstock!

title: Hotel Catalina
text: My wife and I honeymooned at Hotel Catalina back in June 1986, and it instantly became a cherished part of our story. Nestled on a beautiful island, the hotel offered everything we had hoped for — warm hospitality, peaceful surroundings, and a sense of romance that made our first days as newlyweds unforgettable. Thirty-one years later, we came back and Hotel Catalina welcomed us with the same warmth and beauty we remembered. That balcony view still made us pause and smile, and the whole experience felt like stepping back into a treasured chapter of our lives. We hope to return again someday, and when we do, Hotel Catalina will once again be our home. It’s not just a hotel to us — it’s a place where memories live and love continues to grow.
textTranslated: Saya dan istri berbulan madu di Hotel Catalina pada bulan Juni 1986, dan hotel itu langsung menjadi bagian berharga dalam kisah kami. Terletak di pulau yang indah, hotel ini menawarkan semua yang kami harapkan — keramahan yang hangat, suasana yang damai, dan nuansa romantis yang membuat hari-hari pertama kami sebagai pengantin baru tak terlupakan. Tiga puluh satu tahun kemudian, kami kembali dan Hotel Catalina menyambut kami dengan kehangatan dan keindahan yang sama seperti yang kami ingat. Pemandangan dari balkon itu masih membuat kami tersenyum, dan seluruh pengalaman itu terasa seperti kembali ke babak berharga dalam hidup kami. Kami berharap dapat kembali lagi suatu hari nanti, dan ketika kami kembali, Hotel Catalina akan kembali menjadi rumah kami. Ini bukan sekadar hotel bagi kami — ini adalah tempat di mana kenangan hidup dan cinta terus tumbuh.

Thirty-one years later, we came back and Hotel Catalina welcomed us with the same warmth and beauty we remembered. That balcony view still made us pause and smile, and the whole experience felt like stepping back into a treasured chapter of our lives. We hope to return again someday, and when we do, Hotel Catalina will once again be our home. It’s not just a hotel to us — it’s a place where memories live and love continues to grow.

title: Hotel Catalina

Omeo hotel please fix whatever issue is going on.

title: Hotel Catalina
text: Does anyone have that phone number posted at the front desk? I am trying to cancel my reservation coming up and no one answers the main phone number listed. The contact email bounces back and the OMEO website is now some kind of retail home goods site. I contacted the e-commerce provider for the hotel and they said they could not intervene on my behalf. I suppose I’m gonna have to challenge the charge when it comes on my credit card. If someone else could post a review of how to get in contact with OMEO management, I would greatly appreciate it.

Jika ada yang bisa memberikan ulasan tentang cara menghubungi manajemen OMEO, saya akan sangat berterima kasih.

title: Hotel Catalina
text: No one was at the desk during checkin time or it seemed like, the rest of the evening. I know labor costs are high, but having someone man the check-in desk from 3pm to 8pm should be a bare minimum. They just had a sign saying call this number, and someone would come down. Not a good look or first impression. Especially when you have just hiked 24.5 miles on the TCT and are quickly looking to get your room key, shower, eat dinner, and sleep. Overall, the property is dated, but the room was clean. Short 7 minute walk to the ferry, 5 minute walk to Vo ns, the grocery store, and close by to numerous restaurants and shops.
textTranslated: Tidak ada seorang pun di meja resepsionis selama waktu check-in, atau setidaknya sepertinya, sepanjang malam itu. Saya tahu biaya tenaga kerja tinggi, tetapi seharusnya ada seseorang yang menjaga meja resepsionis dari jam 3 sore hingga 8 malam sebagai persyaratan minimum. Mereka hanya memasang tanda bertuliskan "hubungi nomor ini," dan seseorang akan datang. Bukan kesan pertama yang baik. Terutama ketika Anda baru saja mendaki sejauh 24,5 mil di TCT dan ingin segera mendapatkan kunci kamar, mandi, makan malam, dan tidur. Secara keseluruhan, properti ini sudah agak tua, tetapi kamarnya bersih. Hanya 7 menit berjalan kaki ke feri, 5 menit berjalan kaki ke Vóns, toko kelontong, dan dekat dengan banyak restoran dan toko.

title: Hotel Catalina
text: We paid $540 for two days. We arrived during a heat wave, should have read the hotel amenities, no AC. We had no shower because the shower is broken. It only has hot water. Day 2 changing rooms, maintenance is here, he said the valve in the wall needs replaced. I asked for a room like ours, she said that the one below us is rented and we will be in another room on the second floor but no patio attached. I said "then can we get $100.00 off, it's hot no shower or AC, she said you should have read on the website,no air conditioning. I said " We need a shower to cool off".The scalding hot water event last night, 100 shower degrees weather, no AC and my husband is handicapped, his back can't handle the hot water. lot a money. We aren't rich. studio 9 could have upgraded us.
textTranslated: Kami membayar $540 untuk dua hari. Kami tiba saat gelombang panas, seharusnya kami membaca fasilitas hotel, tidak ada AC. Kami tidak bisa mandi karena pancuran rusak. Hanya ada air panas. Hari ke-2, saat berganti kamar, petugas perawatan datang, dia bilang katup di dinding perlu diganti. Saya meminta kamar seperti kamar kami, dia bilang kamar di bawah kami sudah disewa dan kami akan berada di kamar lain di lantai dua tetapi tanpa teras. Saya berkata, "Kalau begitu, bisakah kami mendapat diskon $100,00? Cuacanya panas, tidak ada pancuran atau AC," katanya, "Seharusnya Anda membaca di situs web, tidak ada AC." Saya berkata, "Kami butuh mandi untuk mendinginkan badan." Kejadian air panas yang menyengat tadi malam, cuaca 100 derajat saat mandi, tidak ada AC dan suami saya penyandang disabilitas, punggungnya tidak tahan air panas. Banyak uang yang terbuang. Kami bukan orang kaya. Studio 9 seharusnya bisa meningkatkan kamar kami.

title: Hotel Catalina
text: We've stayed here several times, and the rooms are generally tiny. Even the cottage is cramped. I imagine this is common on the island along with a lack of deep cleaning. Mildew in poorly caulked openings, grime in the tub, gaping screens in the windows. This time, we got a room with a tub. The room was surprisingly big (comparatively), but the tub did not have a stopper, and the front desk was suggested finding the hardware store to buy one ourselves. The tub is the draw for this room and an upcharge, so for it to unusable is ridiculous. The girl working the desk when we arrived was great! She left to another job, and the guy who took over was not. 15 minutes later, when we asked about the stopper, there was another lady at the front desk. Understand that rooms on the island are maintained with the concept of this being a party place and you shouldn't spend much conscious time there.
textTranslated: Kami sudah beberapa kali menginap di sini, dan kamar-kamarnya umumnya kecil. Bahkan pondoknya sempit. Saya rasa hal ini umum terjadi di pulau ini, ditambah dengan kurangnya pembersihan menyeluruh. Jamur di celah-celah yang tidak tertutup rapat, kotoran di bak mandi, dan kasa jendela yang menganga. Kali ini, kami mendapat kamar dengan bak mandi. Kamarnya ternyata cukup besar (relatif), tetapi bak mandinya tidak memiliki sumbat, dan resepsionis menyarankan untuk mencarinya di toko perangkat keras dan membelinya sendiri. Bak mandi adalah daya tarik kamar ini dan dikenakan biaya tambahan, jadi jika tidak bisa digunakan, sungguh konyol. Wanita yang bekerja di meja resepsionis saat kami tiba sangat baik! Dia pindah ke pekerjaan lain, dan pria yang mengambil alih tidak. 15 menit kemudian, ketika kami bertanya tentang sumbatnya, ada wanita lain di resepsionis. Pahamilah bahwa kamar-kamar di pulau ini dirawat dengan konsep sebagai tempat pesta dan Anda tidak boleh menghabiskan banyak waktu di sana.

title: Hotel Catalina
text: We arrived at 2pm and they allowed us to leave our luggage in the lobby. The rooms are OLD with dirty, sticky carpet. The bathrooms are smallllll, like you cannot raise your hands to shampoo your head. We were issued the room in the lobby and heard them vacuuming, ringing the front bell, talking. I requested a vacuum and vacuumed the room myself. One of the staff members was very nice but management was rude and discriminatory. My cousin was given a aaa discount but they denied it for me and their excuse was I booked online ON THEIR OWN WEBSITE. Then I was retaliated for leaving a TRUE review (of disgusting room and small bathroom) and not given the discount. But I couldn't care less because I wouldn't come back here if they paid me.
textTranslated: Kami tiba pukul 2 siang dan mereka mengizinkan kami meninggalkan barang bawaan di lobi. Kamar-kamarnya SANGAT TUA dengan karpet yang kotor dan lengket. Kamar mandinya SANGAT kecil, sampai-sampai Anda tidak bisa mengangkat tangan untuk mencuci rambut. Kami diberi kamar di lobi dan mendengar mereka menyedot debu, membunyikan bel resepsionis, dan mengobrol. Saya meminta alat penyedot debu dan menyedot debu kamar sendiri. Salah satu staf sangat ramah, tetapi manajemennya kasar dan diskriminatif. Sepupu saya mendapat diskon AAA, tetapi mereka menolaknya untuk saya dan alasan mereka adalah saya memesan secara online DI SITUS WEB MEREKA SENDIRI. Kemudian saya mendapat balasan karena memberikan ulasan JUJUR (tentang kamar yang menjijikkan dan kamar mandi yang kecil) dan tidak diberi diskon. Tapi saya tidak peduli karena saya tidak akan kembali ke sini meskipun mereka membayar saya.

title: Hotel Atwater
text: A Wonderful Stay at Hotel Atwater! I recently stayed at Hotel Atwater for two nights with my sister during her visit, and we couldn't be happier with our choice! The hotel is conveniently located in town, surrounded by a variety of restaurants and golf cart rentals, making it easy to explore the island. We loved taking leisurely strolls to enjoy the beautiful views nearby. The atmosphere is peaceful and the hotel itself is clean and well-maintained. The staff was incredibly friendly and helpful, enhancing our overall experience. If you're looking for a convenient and enjoyable stay, I highly recommend Hotel Atwater!

Hotel ini berlokasi strategis di kota, dikelilingi oleh berbagai restoran dan tempat penyewaan kereta golf, sehingga memudahkan untuk menjelajahi pulau. Kami senang berjalan-jalan santai untuk menikmati pemandangan indah di sekitarnya. Suasananya tenang dan hotel itu sendiri bersih dan terawat dengan baik. Stafnya sangat ramah dan membantu, meningkatkan pengalaman kami secara keseluruhan. Jika Anda mencari tempat menginap yang nyaman dan menyenangkan, saya sangat merekomendasikan Hotel Atwater!

title: Hotel Atwater
text: Alright, location is great! Customer service, not that great. I won’t go into detail, but to the owner of this business, you are the only really messing up. Early check in for lots of people (especially me) is a huge plus. I own a business, I believe in going above and beyond for my clients. At this place, it felt like they just want to suck as much money out you as they can. $65 for early check in? I was told my room was ready, yet if I wanted to check in early, it would cost extra 🤔 as a business owner I understand, upsells are great. But this is not the kind of upsell that helps your business. You lost me in the future, and I’m sure TONS of others. No complimentary coffee (every other hotel does). Overall nothing too great about this place besides the price & location. To anyone reading this who hasn’t booked a hotel yet, I’d go with courtyard suites if you’re on a budget, or the pavilion if you’re feeling fancy. The courtyard suites had a much bigger room at the same price, went above and beyond, and had free coffee, snacks, juice, and more. Hotel Atwater, strive to be more like them. You guys have opportunity to make so much more money, but are letting greed get in the way.

Check-in lebih awal untuk banyak orang (terutama saya) adalah nilai tambah yang besar. Saya memiliki bisnis, saya percaya untuk memberikan yang terbaik bagi klien saya. Di tempat ini, rasanya mereka hanya ingin mengambil uang sebanyak mungkin dari Anda. $65 untuk check-in lebih awal? Saya diberitahu kamar saya sudah siap, tetapi jika saya ingin check-in lebih awal, akan dikenakan biaya tambahan 🤔 sebagai pemilik bisnis saya mengerti, penjualan tambahan itu bagus. Tetapi ini bukan jenis penjualan tambahan yang membantu bisnis Anda. Anda kehilangan saya di masa depan, dan saya yakin BANYAK orang lain juga. Satu hal yang sangat saya hargai adalah betapa tenang dan damainya hotel ini. Saya tidak mengalami gangguan suara apa pun, yang membuat masa inap saya sangat santai dan nyaman. title: Hotel Atwater
text: I don’t leave reviews very often, but this takes the cake as one of my second worst stays of my life. Less about the hotel and more about the surroundings and the room. You are directly next to one of the only bars in Avalon that stays open until 2 am. They blare music and there are people constantly screaming and talking out side. All three nights i stayed i was kept up until at least 2 am as I am sensitive to noise. My party had two rooms one of which was the suite, and they said they can hear it as well. You can hear every sound everyone makes. It may be an old building, but if you are sensitive to noise do not stay here.

Mereka memutar musik dengan keras dan ada orang-orang yang terus-menerus berteriak dan berbicara di luar. Selama tiga malam saya menginap, saya terjaga hingga setidaknya pukul 2 pagi karena saya sensitif terhadap suara. Rombongan saya memesan dua kamar, salah satunya suite, dan mereka mengatakan mereka juga bisa mendengarnya. Anda bisa mendengar setiap suara yang dibuat orang lain. Mungkin ini bangunan tua, tetapi jika Anda sensitif terhadap suara, jangan menginap di sini.

title: Hotel Atwater
text: Way over price for a Junior Suite! My stay in a Junior Suite on April 22–23, 2026 did not match the quality advertised. The carpets in both rooms were visibly dirty, the in‑room coffee makers did not work, and the furnishings felt more like a standard room than a suite. I contacted the hotel on April 23 and received a partial refund, but there was no apology, no named representative, and no follow‑up to address the issues or request more information. For the price paid, I expected a higher level of cleanliness, communication, and service. I contacted management but I never received a call or email apology for the inconvenience caused by the issue of my stay. I did receive a partial refund but it wasn't enough! I was shocked because we paid $609 for one night! Management should treat their guest with more respect.

Saya menghubungi hotel pada tanggal 23 April dan menerima pengembalian dana sebagian, tetapi tidak ada permintaan maaf, tidak ada perwakilan yang disebutkan namanya, dan tidak ada tindak lanjut untuk mengatasi masalah atau meminta informasi lebih lanjut. Dengan harga yang dibayarkan, saya mengharapkan tingkat kebersihan, komunikasi, dan layanan yang lebih tinggi. Saya menghubungi manajemen tetapi saya tidak pernah menerima telepon atau email permintaan maaf atas ketidaknyamanan yang disebabkan oleh masalah selama menginap saya. Saya memang menerima pengembalian dana sebagian tetapi itu tidak cukup! Saya terkejut karena kami membayar $609 untuk satu malam! Manajemen seharusnya memperlakukan tamu mereka dengan lebih hormat.

title: Hotel Atwater
text: You’re paying for the lobby, not the room. Lobby is gorgeous, and you do get free access to the gym in the adjacent shops. Rooms are decent, but most have nowhere to sit. It’s a bed only. So, I wouldn’t choose this hotel if you are looking for a comfortable place to hang out during the day. Also unimpressed with the service. Luggage transportation from the pier was not as promised, and the front desk has been unstaffed several times during business hours when we went to ask about something. In my opinion, it’s much too pricey for what you receive. We’ve been to Catalina several times and there are much better options available.

title: Hotel Atwater
text: The rooms are tiny but well designed in order to maximize the space. However, I got very little sleep because the bed was extremely uncomfortable (room 236). The next morning I realized that the problem with the bed was only on my side. The springs must have been damaged. Because the furniture and rugs in the lobby are quite dirty, I wonder if the problem I had with the bed was an isolated issue or if the hotel lacks good oversight. Oh, and rooms don’t have coffee makers!
textTranslated: Kamar-kamarnya kecil tapi didesain dengan baik untuk memaksimalkan ruang. Namun, saya hanya tidur sedikit karena kasurnya sangat tidak nyaman (kamar 236). Keesokan paginya saya menyadari bahwa masalah kasur hanya ada di sisi saya. Pegasnya pasti rusak. Karena furnitur dan karpet di lobi cukup kotor, saya bertanya-tanya apakah masalah yang saya alami dengan kasur itu hanya terjadi di satu tempat atau apakah hotel kurang pengawasan yang baik. Oh, dan kamar-kamarnya tidak memiliki mesin pembuat kopi!

title: Hotel Atwater
text: Hotel Atwater is in a lovely location, and the staff are great. The room itself was nice and had a large bathroom and comfortable linens. That said: - This hotel is old. It was fairly recently renovated, but it does show its age, especially in the amount of noise from foot traffic from our upstairs neighbours. Recommend staying on the top floor if you can. - Many of the carpets in the hotel need to be shampooed. The runners in the main hall were dirty and stained. The carpet in our room was compacted, stained, and dirty. Not the best to walk around on barefoot, which I expect to be able to do in my hotel room. - I stayed on a Saturday night and it was around $450 for a double queen room. I understand that I was paying to be in the heart of Avalon on a Saturday, but for that price, I would have expected at least top-tier cleanliness, if not more amenities.
textTranslated: Hotel Atwater berada di lokasi yang indah, dan stafnya luar biasa. Kamarnya sendiri bagus dan memiliki kamar mandi yang luas serta linen yang nyaman. Namun demikian: - Hotel ini sudah tua. Hotel ini baru saja direnovasi, tetapi tetap terlihat usianya, terutama dari banyaknya suara langkah kaki dari tetangga di lantai atas. Disarankan untuk menginap di lantai atas jika memungkinkan. - Banyak karpet di hotel perlu dicuci. Karpet di aula utama kotor dan bernoda. Karpet di kamar kami padat, bernoda, dan kotor. Tidak nyaman untuk berjalan tanpa alas kaki, yang saya harapkan bisa saya lakukan di kamar hotel saya. - Saya menginap pada Sabtu malam dan harganya sekitar $450 untuk kamar double queen. Saya mengerti bahwa saya membayar untuk berada di jantung Avalon pada hari Sabtu, tetapi dengan harga tersebut, saya mengharapkan setidaknya kebersihan tingkat atas, jika bukan fasilitas yang lebih banyak.

title: Hotel Catalina
text: We took the 7:30am ferry and arrived around 9am. Our rooms weren't ready yet, but we were allowed to leave our bags in the lobby while we explored downtown Avalon. We were a bit sleep-deprived, so we made it back to the hotel at 12:30pm to take a short nap on the chairs outside. The receptionist got our room ready by 1pm and let us check in early. Wow. We were extremely thankful and appreciative. The room is clean, quiet, we love the shower, and the surroundings are quaint and serene. Our experience so far has far surpassed our expectations. 5 stars all round. Good job, team. 💪
textTranslated: Kami naik feri pukul 7:30 pagi dan tiba sekitar pukul 9 pagi. Kamar kami belum siap, tetapi kami diizinkan untuk meninggalkan tas kami di lobi sementara kami menjelajahi pusat kota Avalon. Kami agak kurang tidur, jadi kami kembali ke hotel pukul 12:30 siang untuk tidur siang sebentar di kursi di luar. Resepsionis menyiapkan kamar kami pukul 1 siang dan mengizinkan kami check-in lebih awal. Wow. Kami sangat berterima kasih dan menghargai. Kamarnya bersih, tenang, kami menyukai kamar mandinya, dan lingkungannya unik dan tenang. Pengalaman kami sejauh ini jauh melampaui harapan kami. 5 bintang di semua aspek. Kerja bagus, tim. 💪

Our experience so far has far surpassed our expectations. 5 stars all round. Good job, team. 💪

title: Hotel Catalina
text: You need to remember that this hotel is an antique, so the rooms are small, bathrooms and other features retrofitted. We had a two room "cottage" so I can't speak to the rooms in the main hotel. If you are looking for a modern Ritz experience with all the emmenities and elevators, this place is not for you. Do come here if want to get the feel of Avalon in the 30s or 50s. Steps to everywhere! It was clean, nice towels, comfortable bed. The old fashioned wall heater didn't work in one room. The morning brewed coffee was excellent, but the only fare for breakfast were granola bars or pouch of instant oatmeal. Bring <or buy at Vons grocery store > your own water!!
textTranslated: Anda perlu ingat bahwa hotel ini adalah bangunan antik, jadi kamar-kamarnya kecil, kamar mandi dan fitur lainnya telah direnovasi. Kami menginap di "pondok" dua kamar jadi saya tidak bisa berkomentar tentang kamar-kamar di hotel utama. Jika Anda mencari pengalaman Ritz modern dengan semua fasilitas dan lift, tempat ini bukan untuk Anda. Datanglah ke sini jika Anda ingin merasakan suasana Avalon di tahun 30-an atau 50-an. Akses ke mana-mana sangat mudah! Hotelnya bersih, handuknya bagus, tempat tidurnya nyaman. Pemanas dinding kuno tidak berfungsi di salah satu kamar. Kopi seduh pagi sangat enak, tetapi satu-satunya pilihan untuk sarapan adalah granola bar atau oatmeal instan dalam kemasan. Bawalah air minum sendiri <atau beli di toko Vons>!!

title: Hotel St. Lauren
text: Save your money, time, and privacy. This hotel delivered a horrible experience and showed zero accountability—if I could give it zero stars, I would. This is my first time writing a review, but I felt the need to share this experience to warn others about the dishonesty I encountered with this business. Sometimes, choosing an "affordable" option comes at a greater cost. We booked this hotel based on its presentation and ambiance, but unfortunately, our actual experience was the complete opposite. We stayed for four days and three nights. After returning home, we discovered that some of our valuable belongings were missing — including a diamond necklace stored in my jewelry box inside my luggage, a knife I had purchased as a souvenir, and one of my earrings. After reading other reviews, I realized we weren’t alone — similar incidents have happened before. Sadly, it was too late for us to take further action in real time. We reached out to the hotel multiple times, but the staff showed no integrity or concern for the issues we faced during our stay. Reaching a supervisor or manager was a dead end, and even contacting the owner led nowhere—showing a clear lack of integrity in how this business is operated. I hope this review serves as a warning to others. I’m incredibly disappointed by the invasion of privacy, lack of integrity, and overall disrespect shown by the staff and management. Please consider booking elsewhere — at a place that truly values its guests and their trust.
textTranslated: Hemat uang, waktu, dan privasi Anda. Hotel ini memberikan pengalaman yang mengerikan dan sama sekali tidak bertanggung jawab—jika saya bisa memberikan nol bintang, saya akan melakukannya. Ini adalah pertama kalinya saya menulis ulasan, tetapi saya merasa perlu untuk berbagi pengalaman ini untuk memperingatkan orang lain tentang ketidakjujuran yang saya alami dengan bisnis ini. Terkadang, memilih opsi yang "terjangkau" justru berakibat pada biaya yang lebih besar. Kami memesan hotel ini berdasarkan presentasi dan suasananya, tetapi sayangnya, pengalaman kami yang sebenarnya sangat berbeda. Kami menginap selama empat hari tiga malam. Setelah kembali ke rumah, kami menemukan bahwa beberapa barang berharga kami hilang—termasuk kalung berlian yang disimpan di kotak perhiasan saya di dalam koper, pisau yang saya beli sebagai suvenir, dan salah satu anting saya. Setelah membaca ulasan lain, saya menyadari bahwa kami tidak sendirian—insiden serupa pernah terjadi sebelumnya. Sayangnya, sudah terlambat bagi kami untuk mengambil tindakan lebih lanjut saat itu juga. Kami menghubungi hotel beberapa kali, tetapi staf tidak menunjukkan integritas atau kepedulian terhadap masalah yang kami hadapi selama menginap. Menghubungi supervisor atau manajer tidak membuahkan hasil, dan bahkan menghubungi pemiliknya pun tidak membuahkan hasil—menunjukkan kurangnya integritas dalam pengelolaan bisnis ini. Saya harap ulasan ini menjadi peringatan bagi orang lain. Saya sangat kecewa dengan pelanggaran privasi, kurangnya integritas, dan ketidakhormatan yang ditunjukkan oleh staf dan manajemen. Mohon pertimbangkan untuk memesan di tempat lain—di tempat yang benar-benar menghargai tamu dan kepercayaan mereka.

title: Hotel St. Lauren
text: We visited Cataline Island to attend the jazz festival. Hotel Lauren presents itself as a charming retreat, with its cheerful pink-and-white exterior suggesting warmth and hospitality (and some of the staff were very nice) and a convenient in-town location. Unfortunately, the overall experience inside didn’t live up to the promise—or the price.||High Cost, Low Value||At $500 per night, I expected a comfortable and well-appointed room. Instead, I found myself questioning what exactly I was paying for. The value simply wasn’t there.||Missing Basic Amenities||• Room quality: Sparse furnishings—a hard mattress, a table and a dresser—made the space feel bare. While the closet was generously sized, the windows were so dirty it was difficult to enjoy the view.||• No blanket: Surprisingly, the room lacked a blanket. We were left with only a thin sheet, which was inadequate for the chilly mid-50s evening temperatures.||• Bathroom essentials absent: No shower gel, lotion, shampoo, or conditioner. These are basic amenities I expect from any hotel, especially at this price point.||• No in-room coffee: There was no coffee maker in the room, and the lobby coffee was undrinkable. We ended up walking into town just to get a decent cup.||• Noise issues: A loud altercation between guests disrupted the night, and the thin walls made it impossible to ignore.||Overall, my stay at Hotel Lauren was disappointing. The lack of basic comforts and amenities made the experience feel more like a budget motel than a premium hotel. When paying top-tier rates, guests deserve more than just a pretty façade. I probably wouldn’t recommend this hotel to travelers seeking value, comfort or a restful experience.
textTranslated: Kami mengunjungi Pulau Cataline untuk menghadiri festival jazz. Hotel Lauren menampilkan dirinya sebagai tempat peristirahatan yang menawan, dengan eksterior merah muda dan putih yang ceria yang menunjukkan kehangatan dan keramahan (dan beberapa stafnya sangat ramah) dan lokasi yang nyaman di pusat kota. Sayangnya, pengalaman keseluruhan di dalam hotel tidak sesuai dengan janji—atau harganya.||Biaya Tinggi, Nilai Rendah||Dengan harga $500 per malam, saya mengharapkan kamar yang nyaman dan lengkap. Sebaliknya, saya malah mempertanyakan apa sebenarnya yang saya bayar. Nilainya sama sekali tidak sepadan.||Fasilitas Dasar yang Kurang||• Kualitas kamar: Perabotan yang minim—kasur keras, meja, dan lemari—membuat ruangan terasa kosong. Meskipun lemari pakaian berukuran cukup besar, jendelanya sangat kotor sehingga sulit untuk menikmati pemandangan.||• Tidak ada selimut: Anehnya, kamar tersebut tidak memiliki selimut. Kami hanya diberi selembar kain tipis, yang tidak cukup untuk suhu malam yang dingin sekitar 50-an derajat Fahrenheit.||• Perlengkapan kamar mandi tidak ada: Tidak ada sabun mandi, losion, sampo, atau kondisioner. Ini adalah fasilitas dasar yang saya harapkan dari hotel mana pun, terutama dengan harga seperti ini.||• Tidak ada kopi di kamar: Tidak ada mesin kopi di kamar, dan kopi di lobi tidak layak minum. Kami akhirnya berjalan kaki ke kota hanya untuk mendapatkan secangkir kopi yang layak.||• Masalah kebisingan: Pertengkaran keras antar tamu mengganggu malam, dan dinding yang tipis membuat suara itu tidak bisa diabaikan.||Secara keseluruhan, pengalaman menginap saya di Hotel Lauren mengecewakan. Kurangnya kenyamanan dan fasilitas dasar membuat pengalaman terasa lebih seperti motel murah daripada hotel premium. Saat membayar tarif kelas atas, tamu berhak mendapatkan lebih dari sekadar tampilan luar yang cantik. Saya mungkin tidak akan merekomendasikan hotel ini kepada wisatawan yang mencari nilai, kenyamanan, atau pengalaman yang menenangkan.

We ended up walking into town just to get a decent cup.||• Noise issues: A loud altercation between guests disrupted the night, and the thin walls made it impossible to ignore.||Overall, my stay at Hotel Lauren was disappointing. The lack of basic comforts and amenities made the experience feel more like a budget motel than a premium hotel. When paying top-tier rates, guests deserve more than just a pretty façade. I probably wouldn’t recommend this hotel to travelers seeking value, comfort or a restful experience.

title: Hotel St. Lauren
text: **⭐ 1-Star Review: Unacceptable Theft and Dishonesty – Avoid This Hotel!** On **July 3, 2025**, I stayed at Hotel St. Lauren in Catalina Island and experienced a **horrific breach of trust**. After leaving my bag with **$2,420 in cash** in the room, I returned to find the money stolen. The hotel’s response was nothing short of **negligent and deceitful**: - **Delayed Investigation**: When I reported the theft immediately, staff claimed my room keys were "duplicated" and promised to review security cameras. Despite my providing the **exact timeframe** I was away, they took **a full week** to "check" the footage—only to dismiss my claim with no resolution. - **Refusal to Escalate**: I called **multiple times** demanding to speak to the owner or manager, but was repeatedly stonewalled. Their lack of urgency or accountability suggests **complicity or indifference**. - **Zero Accountability**: The hotel’s final response—that "no one entered the room"—defies logic. If keys were duplicated (as *they* claimed), their security system is clearly flawed, yet they offered no apology, refund, or further action. This is **not just about stolen money** but about a business that **fails to protect guests** and then gaslights them. The delay in reviewing cameras (if they even did) raises serious questions about **evidence tampering**. **WARNING**: Do **not** trust this hotel with your valuables. Their staff’s incompetence—or worse, theft—will ruin your trip. I’ve filed a police report and urge others to **avoid Hotel St. Lauren at all costs**. **Update**: As of July 27, 2025, the owner **still** has not contacted me.

Setelah meninggalkan tas saya berisi **uang tunai $2.420** di kamar, saya kembali dan mendapati uang tersebut telah dicuri. Tanggapan hotel tersebut sangat **lalai dan menipu**: - **Investigasi yang Tertunda**: Ketika saya segera melaporkan pencurian tersebut, staf mengklaim kunci kamar saya "diduplikasi" dan berjanji untuk meninjau kamera keamanan. Meskipun saya memberikan **jangka waktu pasti** saya pergi, mereka membutuhkan **satu minggu penuh** untuk "memeriksa" rekaman tersebut—hanya untuk menolak klaim saya tanpa penyelesaian. - **Penolakan untuk Meningkatkan Masalah**: Saya menelepon **beberapa kali** menuntut untuk berbicara dengan pemilik atau manajer, tetapi berulang kali diabaikan. Kurangnya urgensi atau akuntabilitas mereka menunjukkan **keterlibatan atau ketidakpedulian**. - **Tidak Ada Pertanggungjawaban Sama Sekali**: Tanggapan akhir hotel—bahwa "tidak ada yang masuk ke kamar"—bertentangan dengan logika. Jika kunci diduplikasi (seperti yang *mereka* klaim), sistem keamanan mereka jelas cacat, namun mereka tidak menawarkan permintaan maaf, pengembalian dana, atau tindakan lebih lanjut. Ini **bukan hanya tentang uang yang dicuri** tetapi tentang bisnis yang **gagal melindungi tamu** dan kemudian memanipulasi mereka. Keterlambatan dalam meninjau kamera (jika mereka memang melakukannya) menimbulkan pertanyaan serius tentang **pengrusakan bukti**. **PERINGATAN**: **Jangan** percayakan barang berharga Anda ke hotel ini. Ketidakmampuan staf mereka—atau lebih buruk lagi, pencurian—akan merusak perjalanan Anda. Saya telah mengajukan laporan polisi dan mendesak orang lain untuk **menghindari Hotel St. Lauren dengan segala cara**. **Pembaruan**: Hingga 27 Juli 2025, pemilik **masih** belum menghubungi saya.

title: Hotel St. Lauren
text: My girls and I were going to stay here back in April 2025 but it smelled so bad as soon as we walked in. He said it was the outside so I thought I’ll give it a try. Not even 15 minutes in the room which was dirty, my 4 year old & I started coughing from the cigarette smell. It was really bad. We got our bags and left without knowing where I was going to take my daughters to stay the night. I asked the front desk for a refund and unfortunately they said no & hopper tried to help but it was out of their hands. I lost all of my money (which seemed high for a place like that) and had no where to go. The front was very unhelpful. We will never book there again. Everything looks dirty and yes most things are old, in fact the building is old but there is certain areas that can be scrubbed and cleaned. Like the seat it was filthy dirty.

Dia bilang baunya dari luar, jadi saya pikir saya akan mencobanya. Belum sampai 15 menit di kamar yang kotor itu, saya dan anak saya yang berusia 4 tahun mulai batuk karena bau rokok. Baunya sangat menyengat. Kami mengambil tas kami dan pergi tanpa tahu ke mana saya akan membawa anak-anak perempuan saya untuk menginap malam itu. Saya meminta pengembalian uang ke resepsionis dan sayangnya mereka menolak, dan Hopper mencoba membantu tetapi itu di luar kendali mereka. Saya kehilangan semua uang saya (yang tampaknya mahal untuk tempat seperti itu) dan tidak punya tempat tujuan. Resepsionis sangat tidak membantu. Kami tidak akan pernah memesan di sana lagi. Semuanya terlihat kotor dan ya, sebagian besar barang memang sudah tua, bahkan bangunannya pun sudah tua, tetapi ada beberapa area yang bisa digosok dan dibersihkan. Seperti kursi, sangat kotor.

title: Hotel St. Lauren
text: Usually I do not write bad reviews, but this was the worst experience ever.. The Room was basically a basement level, next to the reception, no other room available. Paper walls you could listen everything, gap between door and floor with the light of the hall always on. Water system extremely noisy, you can tell when people from other rooms were flashing the toilet at night time, my soon thought it was the ferry. Most uncomfortable bed and pillows of my life. The only positive note is that the day after we left. Absolutely no idea of what hospitality means, Reviews should help to improve, but you deserve to be out of business.

title: Hotel St. Lauren
text: I didn’t have a problem at all with this hotel. The room was an amazing deal. It is a very cute note from the outside and although it is older and could use some cosmetic updates it worked for what we needed, a place to sleep. Loved the 6th floor patio, great view. The bed was firm but not uncomfortably so. AC worked fine, shower worked. Hot water took awhile to kick in but it did which was okay with me. Tv worked just fine. The bathroom could use some love and care but toilet flushed and sink and shower worked so no major complaints. The attendant that checked us in was very nice and they even have a coffee/tea bar in the lobby in the morning. 11 am checkout was fabulous! Not too early and Vons is just a block down the street. Just a couple of blocks from the Main Street too so close enough to everything! Would book again!
textTranslated: Saya sama sekali tidak memiliki masalah dengan hotel ini. Kamarnya sangat terjangkau. Dari luar terlihat sangat cantik dan meskipun sudah agak tua dan perlu beberapa perbaikan kosmetik, kamar ini sesuai dengan kebutuhan kami, yaitu tempat untuk tidur. Saya suka teras di lantai 6, pemandangannya bagus. Kasurnya agak keras tetapi tidak terlalu keras. AC berfungsi dengan baik, pancuran juga berfungsi. Air panas agak lama keluar tetapi akhirnya keluar, dan itu tidak masalah bagi saya. TV berfungsi dengan baik. Kamar mandi perlu sedikit perawatan, tetapi toilet dan wastafel serta pancuran berfungsi, jadi tidak ada keluhan besar. Petugas yang memeriksa kami sangat ramah dan mereka bahkan memiliki bar kopi/teh di lobi di pagi hari. Check-out pukul 11 ​​pagi sangat bagus! Tidak terlalu pagi dan Vons hanya berjarak satu blok dari hotel. Hanya beberapa blok dari Jalan Utama juga, jadi cukup dekat dengan semuanya! Akan memesan lagi!

title: Hotel Atwater
text: Our stay at this hotel was exceptional, and what stood out most was the incredible staff. From the moment we walked in, we were welcomed with such genuine warmth. It immediately set the tone for the entire experience. They had us laughing, made us feel completely at ease, and hit the perfect and rare balance of being both highly professional and authentically kind.||Every interaction felt thoughtful and intentional. Dylan at the front desk went above and beyond, helping us plan our time on the island with such enthusiasm and attention to detail and it genuinely elevated our trip. Oliver took exceptional care of us throughout our stay, always anticipating what we might need before we even asked and making everything feel seamless. Jeremy, was such a sweet young man and even offered to assist us and transport our luggage to the ferry port. Joel who assisted us directly, was equally outstanding. He was incredibly patient, gracious, and accommodating when we asked for multiple items to be delivered to our room accidentally on separate occasions rather than all at once. There was also a wonderful woman at the front desk who took the time to share stories about the hotel’s history with such passion that it added a meaningful, personal layer to our visit.||Beyond the service, the hotel itself was spotless and carried a unique charm that made it feel inviting.||Overall, the experience felt top tier, and that is largely a testament to the excellence of the team. This is the kind of place you remember and return to.
textTranslated: Penginapan kami di hotel ini sangat luar biasa, dan yang paling menonjol adalah stafnya yang luar biasa. Sejak saat kami masuk, kami disambut dengan kehangatan yang tulus. Hal itu langsung menentukan suasana keseluruhan pengalaman kami. Mereka membuat kami tertawa, membuat kami merasa nyaman sepenuhnya, dan mencapai keseimbangan yang sempurna dan langka antara profesionalisme tinggi dan kebaikan yang tulus. Setiap interaksi terasa bijaksana dan disengaja. Dylan di meja resepsionis melakukan lebih dari yang diharapkan, membantu kami merencanakan waktu kami di pulau dengan antusiasme dan perhatian terhadap detail, dan itu benar-benar meningkatkan perjalanan kami. Oliver merawat kami dengan sangat baik selama kami menginap, selalu mengantisipasi apa yang mungkin kami butuhkan bahkan sebelum kami bertanya dan membuat semuanya terasa lancar. Jeremy, adalah seorang pemuda yang sangat manis dan bahkan menawarkan untuk membantu kami dan mengangkut barang bawaan kami ke pelabuhan feri. Joel yang membantu kami secara langsung, juga sama luar biasanya. Dia sangat sabar, ramah, dan akomodatif ketika kami meminta beberapa barang untuk diantarkan ke kamar kami secara tidak sengaja pada kesempatan yang berbeda daripada sekaligus. Ada juga seorang wanita luar biasa di meja resepsionis yang meluangkan waktu untuk berbagi cerita tentang sejarah hotel dengan penuh semangat sehingga menambahkan sentuhan pribadi yang bermakna pada kunjungan kami. Selain pelayanan, hotel itu sendiri sangat bersih dan memiliki pesona unik yang membuatnya terasa mengundang. Secara keseluruhan, pengalaman terasa sangat istimewa, dan itu sebagian besar merupakan bukti keunggulan tim. Ini adalah jenis tempat yang akan Anda ingat dan ingin Anda kunjungi kembali.

title: Hotel Atwater
text: Overall, I had a pleasant stay at Hotel Atwater. The location is great and the staff was friendly and helpful. However, I do want to mention that the bed in my room was listed as a king, but it felt significantly smaller — closer to a queen size. I own a king bed at home, so this stood out to me right away. It may have been a different setup or configuration, but it did not feel like a standard king. This wasn’t a dealbreaker for my stay, but I do think it’s important for accuracy so future guests know what to expect. Aside from that, the hotel was clean, well-maintained, and I would consider staying again.
textTranslated: Secara keseluruhan, saya menikmati masa inap saya di Hotel Atwater. Lokasinya bagus dan stafnya ramah serta membantu. Namun, saya ingin menyebutkan bahwa tempat tidur di kamar saya terdaftar sebagai tempat tidur king, tetapi terasa jauh lebih kecil — lebih mirip ukuran queen. Saya memiliki tempat tidur king di rumah, jadi ini langsung menarik perhatian saya. Mungkin karena pengaturan atau konfigurasi yang berbeda, tetapi tidak terasa seperti tempat tidur king standar. Ini bukan masalah besar bagi masa inap saya, tetapi saya pikir ini penting untuk akurasi agar tamu di masa mendatang tahu apa yang diharapkan. Selain itu, hotelnya bersih, terawat dengan baik, dan saya akan mempertimbangkan untuk menginap di sana lagi.

title: Hotel Atwater
text: The Atwater was one of the original hotels built by the Wrigley Family. The staff was very helpful - The hotel clean and has charm. We had an Accessible Room, I am not sure if it was because of needing to leave room for a wheel chair but the room would have been a lot better had there been a cabinet, dresser or at least a 2nd chair. I do not know: if we were to have gotten a room with a queen bed (a smaller bed) would there have been room for furniture ? As to location, central to town about a block back from the waterfront - we were on the top floor so saw some of the harbor but looking across some rather unattractive roof of another building. There was a mini fridge and ice bucket - surprised no in room coffee service.
textTranslated: Hotel Atwater adalah salah satu hotel asli yang dibangun oleh Keluarga Wrigley. Stafnya sangat membantu - Hotelnya bersih dan memiliki pesona tersendiri. Kami mendapatkan Kamar Aksesibel, saya tidak yakin apakah itu karena perlu menyediakan ruang untuk kursi roda, tetapi kamar akan jauh lebih baik jika ada lemari, meja rias, atau setidaknya kursi kedua. Saya tidak tahu: jika kami mendapatkan kamar dengan tempat tidur queen (tempat tidur yang lebih kecil), apakah akan ada ruang untuk furnitur? Mengenai lokasi, berada di pusat kota sekitar satu blok dari tepi laut - kami berada di lantai atas sehingga dapat melihat sebagian pelabuhan tetapi terhalang oleh atap bangunan lain yang agak tidak menarik. Ada kulkas mini dan ember es - saya terkejut tidak ada layanan kopi di kamar.

We had an Accessible Room, I am not sure if it was because of needing to leave room for a wheel chair but the room would have been a lot better had there been a cabinet, dresser or at least a 2nd chair. I do not know: if we were to have gotten a room with a queen bed (a smaller bed) would there have been room for furniture ? As to location, central to town about a block back from the waterfront - we were on the top floor so saw some of the harbor but looking across some rather unattractive roof of another building. There was a mini fridge and ice bucket - surprised no in room coffee service.

title: Hotel Atwater
text: The hotel is nice and situated steps away from the bay. It supposedly reopened a year ago after years of renovation. The customer service is standard, not the best but not the worst. The rooms were smaller than it looked in the pictures but my main complaint is cleanliness. Some of our sheets had stains or dirt on them. The decorative pillows had black stains on it. It’s obvious they aren’t cleaned in between guests. We set those aside and off the beds. The hotel doesn’t have a restaurant onsite either. During the day it’s fine since we can dine elsewhere but at night, it gets harder to find snacks once the eateries close.
textTranslated: Hotelnya bagus dan terletak hanya beberapa langkah dari teluk. Konon, hotel ini dibuka kembali setahun yang lalu setelah bertahun-tahun direnovasi. Pelayanan pelanggannya standar, tidak terbaik tetapi juga tidak terburuk. Kamarnya lebih kecil dari yang terlihat di foto, tetapi keluhan utama saya adalah kebersihan. Beberapa seprai kami bernoda atau kotor. Bantal hiasnya bernoda hitam. Jelas sekali bantal-bantal itu tidak dibersihkan di antara tamu. Kami menyingkirkan bantal-bantal itu dari tempat tidur. Hotel ini juga tidak memiliki restoran di dalam hotel. Pada siang hari tidak masalah karena kami bisa makan di tempat lain, tetapi pada malam hari, akan lebih sulit menemukan makanan ringan setelah tempat makan tutup.

title: Hotel Atwater
text: We had a lovely birthday celebration at the Hotel Atwater over Spring Break. Our family stayed in the Phillip Knight Suite. It was large and had views of the ocean. The Hotel delivered champagne and chocolates upon our arrival. The staff was very friendly and housekeeping did a great job servicing our room daily. They had a cute cafe you clan purchase coffee and breakfast and the hotel is in the heart of downtown. We will be back!

Pihak hotel mengirimkan sampanye dan cokelat saat kedatangan kami. Stafnya sangat ramah dan petugas kebersihan melakukan pekerjaan yang luar biasa dalam membersihkan kamar kami setiap hari. Mereka memiliki kafe yang lucu tempat Anda dapat membeli kopi dan sarapan, dan hotel ini terletak di jantung kota. Kami akan kembali!

Room was small but well situated & lovely. ||||We enjoyed it so much & will absolutely be back!!

title: Hotel St. Lauren
text: This hotel is adorable. Understand where you are and don't expect this to be a Hilton experience. It's quaint and brought back memories from a trip to Uruguay. Perfect location, just a short walk to all the shops, restaurants, the ferry, and Casino Point. I was pleasantly surprised by the water pressure in the shower for being on the 6th floor. I was slightly disappointed at the locked patio when I went out to catch the sunrise. When I came back to the hotel after 8am it was still locked. The bed was comfortable, after a long day out adventuring I slept extremely well. While out for about 2 hours this morning I had my external battery charger plugged into the wall to charge for the day and it never fully charged, which is very usual. The coffee in the lobby was a nice surprise first thing in the morning. I really enjoyed this hotel stay and was grateful the room was ready when I asked for early check-in at 2pm. Would definitely recommend 10/10.
textTranslated: Hotel ini sangat menggemaskan. Pahami di mana Anda berada dan jangan berharap ini akan menjadi pengalaman seperti di Hilton. Hotel ini unik dan mengingatkan saya pada perjalanan ke Uruguay. Lokasinya sempurna, hanya berjalan kaki singkat ke semua toko, restoran, feri, dan Casino Point. Saya sangat terkejut dengan tekanan air di kamar mandi meskipun berada di lantai 6. Saya sedikit kecewa karena teras terkunci saat saya keluar untuk menikmati matahari terbit. Ketika saya kembali ke hotel setelah pukul 8 pagi, teras masih terkunci. Kasurnya nyaman, setelah seharian berpetualang saya tidur sangat nyenyak. Saat keluar sekitar 2 jam pagi ini, saya mencolokkan pengisi daya baterai eksternal saya ke dinding untuk mengisi daya seharian dan baterai tidak pernah terisi penuh, yang sangat biasa terjadi. Kopi di lobi adalah kejutan yang menyenangkan di pagi hari. Saya sangat menikmati menginap di hotel ini dan bersyukur kamar sudah siap ketika saya meminta check-in lebih awal pukul 2 siang. Pasti akan merekomendasikan 10/10.

title: Hotel St. Lauren
text: The pictures are deceiving! The room smelled old and musty. The bed was uncomfortable. I checked for bed bugs when we walked in because it felt unclean. I honestly didn't even want to shower because it wasn't comfortable and the water pressure was horrible. The pillowcases didn't look changed. To open the patio door you have to use your full body to open, makes a loud hard noise. It was my birthday weekend, so we made the best of it. The walls were thin, we thought someone was coming in our room...lol. Met a couple who also felt bamboozled by the online photos. Then met a guy on the elevator, who was highly pissed about the hotel quality and said he's leaving a review. Good walking distance to everything from where the hotel is located and our patio view was good. But my husband and I will never stay here again. 👎🏻 HOTEL NEEDS SERIOUS RENOVATION!
textTranslated: Foto-fotonya menipu! Kamarnya berbau apek dan pengap. Kasurnya tidak nyaman. Saya memeriksa apakah ada kutu kasur saat kami masuk karena terasa kotor. Jujur saja, saya bahkan tidak ingin mandi karena tidak nyaman dan tekanan airnya sangat buruk. Sarung bantalnya tampak belum diganti. Untuk membuka pintu teras, Anda harus menggunakan seluruh tubuh Anda, dan itu menimbulkan suara keras. Itu adalah akhir pekan ulang tahun saya, jadi kami menikmatinya. Dindingnya tipis, kami pikir ada orang yang masuk ke kamar kami...lol. Bertemu dengan pasangan yang juga merasa tertipu oleh foto-foto online. Kemudian bertemu dengan seorang pria di lift, yang sangat marah tentang kualitas hotel dan mengatakan dia akan memberikan ulasan. Jaraknya cukup dekat dengan semua tempat dari hotel dan pemandangan dari teras kami bagus. Tapi saya dan suami saya tidak akan pernah menginap di sini lagi. 👎🏻 HOTEL INI MEMBUTUHKAN RENOVASI SERIUS!

title: Hotel St. Lauren
text: If you are looking for somewhere to just lay your head for the weekend then this place will do. But if you're looking for any type of luxury or amenities this is not the hotel for you. We came to the island for my wife's birthday and we chose this place because of the reviews and a few photos. I would not recommend this hotel if you're looking for any type of luxury. The hotel does absolutely nothing to make the place comfortable for you. It's basically just a room with a bed. The shower has no pressure, literally none at all. Same with the faucet on the sink. The bathroom smells old and moldy, and the mattress literally feels like a box spring. The good thing is it's centrally located to everything, 5 minute walk and you're to the beach and restaurants. We will never stay here again. It's absolutely not worth the money we spent for the room.
textTranslated: Jika Anda hanya mencari tempat untuk beristirahat di akhir pekan, tempat ini cocok. Tetapi jika Anda mencari kemewahan atau fasilitas apa pun, hotel ini bukan untuk Anda. Kami datang ke pulau ini untuk ulang tahun istri saya dan kami memilih tempat ini karena ulasan dan beberapa foto. Saya tidak akan merekomendasikan hotel ini jika Anda mencari kemewahan apa pun. Hotel ini sama sekali tidak melakukan apa pun untuk membuat tempat itu nyaman. Pada dasarnya hanya sebuah kamar dengan tempat tidur. Pancuran airnya tidak bertekanan, benar-benar tidak ada sama sekali. Sama halnya dengan keran di wastafel. Kamar mandi berbau apek dan berjamur, dan kasurnya terasa seperti kasur pegas. Untungnya, lokasinya strategis, hanya 5 menit berjalan kaki dan Anda sudah sampai di pantai dan restoran. Kami tidak akan pernah menginap di sini lagi. Sama sekali tidak sepadan dengan uang yang kami keluarkan untuk kamar tersebut.

title: Hotel St. Lauren
text: This hotel is conveniently located in Avalon. The room was pretty basic , but a great value due to its proximity to all the action. The ocean view rooms seem like they would have a great view, but we didn’t want to pay the extra for that. The front desk mentioned they would be willing to store our bags before check-in, though we didn’t take them up on it, it was a nice offer. The old pink building reminds me of San Francisco.

Kamar dengan pemandangan laut tampaknya memiliki pemandangan yang bagus, tetapi kami tidak ingin membayar lebih untuk itu. Resepsionis menyebutkan mereka bersedia menyimpan tas kami sebelum check-in, meskipun kami tidak menerimanya, itu tawaran yang bagus. Bangunan tua berwarna merah muda mengingatkan saya pada San Francisco.

title: Hotel St. Lauren
text: I stayed 2 night and they forcefully charged me 3 nights at this place. They charged 450 per night. Outlets receptacles needed to be replaced as it didn't hold any plug in place. They apperantly use ocean water in their plumbing system that when urinating at night, you can see the plankton light up when using the water and when flushing the toilet. Bed was horribly soft, our backs hurt for two days. I wouldn't recommend.
textTranslated: Saya menginap 2 malam dan mereka menagih saya dengan kasar untuk menginap 3 malam di tempat ini. Mereka menagih 450 per malam. Stopkontak dan stopkontak perlu diganti karena tidak bisa menahan steker. Mereka tampaknya menggunakan air laut dalam sistem perpipaan mereka sehingga ketika buang air kecil di malam hari, Anda dapat melihat plankton menyala saat menggunakan air dan saat menyiram toilet. Tempat tidurnya sangat empuk, punggung kami sakit selama dua hari. Saya tidak merekomendasikannya.

title: Hotel St. Lauren
text: The young brunette receptionist was rude. She would not let me charge my phone behind the front desk for an hour or so, after we checked out. She also wouldn't let us leave our bags at the hotel for an hour while we walked around before our ferry left. The rooms were very tired, tiles in bathroom cracked throughout, the A/C did not work well, the shower was very unsightly, and not very funtional. Our digital key NEVER worked and so we had to go downstairs and get a new one, each time we came and left. Mostly I was disappointed at the rude and inhospitable attitude of the younger receptionist on the day we departed. No reason anyone should treat hotel guests the way she treated us. She has the wrong job. I will never go back there.
textTranslated: Resepsionis muda berambut cokelat itu sangat tidak sopan. Dia tidak mengizinkan saya mengisi daya ponsel saya di belakang meja resepsionis selama sekitar satu jam setelah kami check-out. Dia juga tidak mengizinkan kami meninggalkan tas kami di hotel selama satu jam sementara kami berjalan-jalan sebelum feri berangkat. Kamar-kamarnya sangat usang, ubin di kamar mandi retak di mana-mana, AC tidak berfungsi dengan baik, pancuran sangat tidak sedap dipandang, dan tidak terlalu fungsional. Kunci digital kami TIDAK PERNAH berfungsi sehingga kami harus turun ke bawah dan mengambil kunci baru setiap kali kami datang dan pergi. Yang paling membuat saya kecewa adalah sikap tidak sopan dan tidak ramah dari resepsionis muda itu pada hari kami berangkat. Tidak ada alasan mengapa siapa pun harus memperlakukan tamu hotel seperti yang dia lakukan kepada kami. Dia salah memilih pekerjaan. Saya tidak akan pernah kembali ke sana.

title: Hampton Inn Austin-North @ I-35 & Hwy 183
text: Great stay for the George Strait weekend! The location was perfect — easy on and off the highway and, most importantly, far from the UT traffic mess. Our original room wasn’t ready on time, but Jackson at the front desk immediately took care of us and moved us to a comparable room without any hassle. The room was clean, stocked, and comfortable, though the beds were a little firmer than we’re used to. The pool was spotless, and Jackson was sweet, knowledgeable, and incredibly helpful throughout our stay.
textTranslated: Penginapan yang menyenangkan untuk akhir pekan di George Strait! Lokasinya sempurna — mudah diakses dari dan ke jalan raya dan, yang terpenting, jauh dari kemacetan lalu lintas UT. Kamar awal kami belum siap tepat waktu, tetapi Jackson di resepsionis segera membantu kami dan memindahkan kami ke kamar yang setara tanpa kesulitan. Kamar bersih, lengkap, dan nyaman, meskipun kasurnya sedikit lebih keras dari yang biasa kami gunakan. Kolam renangnya sangat bersih, dan Jackson ramah, berpengetahuan luas, dan sangat membantu selama kami menginap.

text: Very disappointing for a Hampton. Blow dryer sparked and smoked. Reported it to staff but didn't get a replacement. Felt run down and a little dirty. Jujur saja, saya pikir lift itu tersangkut di antara lantai sampai akhirnya pintu terbuka.

title: The Avalon Hotel on Catalina Island
text: Our first trip to Catalina Island was made even better by choosing this hotel. I specifically looked for a quiet location away from the main street, and this spot was absolutely ideal: peaceful, yet just a short walk from all the restaurants and attractions. I'm a very light sleeper, so this was important to me. ||The hotel is an easy 10-minute walk from the Catalina Express port. A pro-tip for future guests: notify the front desk of your arrival time; they were incredibly accommodating and prioritized an early check-in for us! Our room (301) had a stunning view, which was a highlight of our stay. With the Vons grocery market nearby, everything we needed was a short walk away. The staff was friendly, courteous and professional. They have set a very high bar, and it'll be difficult to stay anywhere else on our next visit.
textTranslated: Perjalanan pertama kami ke Pulau Catalina menjadi lebih baik berkat pilihan hotel ini. Saya secara khusus mencari lokasi yang tenang jauh dari jalan utama, dan tempat ini benar-benar ideal: damai, namun hanya berjarak beberapa langkah dari semua restoran dan tempat wisata. Saya sangat mudah terbangun, jadi ini penting bagi saya. Hotel ini hanya berjarak 10 menit berjalan kaki dari pelabuhan Catalina Express. Tips untuk tamu selanjutnya: beri tahu resepsionis tentang waktu kedatangan Anda; mereka sangat membantu dan memprioritaskan check-in lebih awal untuk kami! Kamar kami (301) memiliki pemandangan yang menakjubkan, yang merupakan salah satu hal terbaik selama kami menginap. Dengan supermarket Vons di dekatnya, semua yang kami butuhkan hanya berjarak beberapa langkah. Stafnya ramah, sopan, dan profesional. Mereka telah menetapkan standar yang sangat tinggi, dan akan sulit untuk menginap di tempat lain pada kunjungan kami berikutnya.

title: La Unica Motel
text: I wasn’t expecting this level of poor service. The staff’s response was disappointing and felt very insensitive. We were basically told that because the place is cheap, we shouldn’t expect better treatment. That attitude alone was unacceptable. To make matters worse, there was no shower inside the room—you have to use a shared outdoor shower, which was never clearly communicated beforehand. The room and overall accommodations did not match expectations. The entire experience was frustrating, uncomfortable, and not worth the money saved. Customer service, cleanliness, and transparency all fell short. I would not stay here again and cannot recommend this place to others.
textTranslated: Saya tidak menyangka akan mendapatkan pelayanan seburuk ini. Tanggapan staf sangat mengecewakan dan terasa sangat tidak peka. Pada dasarnya kami diberitahu bahwa karena tempatnya murah, kami tidak seharusnya mengharapkan perlakuan yang lebih baik. Sikap seperti itu saja sudah tidak dapat diterima. Lebih buruk lagi, tidak ada kamar mandi di dalam kamar—Anda harus menggunakan kamar mandi luar bersama, yang tidak pernah dikomunikasikan dengan jelas sebelumnya. Kamar dan akomodasi secara keseluruhan tidak sesuai dengan harapan. Seluruh pengalaman itu membuat frustrasi, tidak nyaman, dan tidak sepadan dengan uang yang dihemat. Pelayanan pelanggan, kebersihan, dan transparansi semuanya mengecewakan. Saya tidak akan menginap di sini lagi dan tidak dapat merekomendasikan tempat ini kepada orang lain.

title: La Unica Motel
text: I had a great stay at this place. The staff was professional and welcoming. The rooms were spotless and smelled so fresh and clean, which made the stay even more comfortable. The housekeeper did an amazing job and clearly takes pride in their work. One of my favorite things was the decor — it was unlike any motel I’ve stayed in before. The design was tasteful, colorful, and full of beautiful murals that gave the place so much personality and charm. A really cool feature was the double-bed room layout. It actually had two separate spacious rooms connected by a shared bathroom that could be entered from both sides. It made the space feel extra private and comfortable. Absolutely loved my stay and would definitely come back!
textTranslated: Saya sangat menikmati menginap di tempat ini. Stafnya profesional dan ramah. Kamar-kamarnya bersih dan berbau sangat segar dan bersih, yang membuat masa menginap semakin nyaman. Petugas kebersihan melakukan pekerjaan yang luar biasa dan jelas bangga dengan pekerjaannya. Salah satu hal favorit saya adalah dekorasinya — berbeda dengan motel mana pun yang pernah saya tinggali sebelumnya. Desainnya berkelas, penuh warna, dan dipenuhi mural-mural indah yang memberikan tempat ini begitu banyak kepribadian dan pesona. Fitur yang sangat keren adalah tata letak kamar dengan tempat tidur ganda. Kamar ini sebenarnya memiliki dua kamar luas terpisah yang terhubung oleh kamar mandi bersama yang dapat diakses dari kedua sisi. Hal ini membuat ruangan terasa lebih pribadi dan nyaman. Saya sangat menyukai masa menginap saya dan pasti akan kembali lagi!

Absolutely loved my stay and would definitely come back!

title: La Unica Motel
text: Their listing are purposely misleading. They don't mention there is no shower in the room on Agoda and on Expedia where it is mentioned it's done in a way that still isn't clear. It would have been great if they apologize and acknowledged the mistake, but instead I felt insulted, ignored and at one point blamed like I did something wrong pointing it out multiple times that the property description says all rooms have rainfall showers. Ruined my stay. Definitely avoid the place.

Akan lebih baik jika mereka meminta maaf dan mengakui kesalahan tersebut, tetapi sebaliknya saya merasa dihina, diabaikan, dan pada satu titik disalahkan seolah-olah saya melakukan kesalahan karena berulang kali menunjukkan bahwa deskripsi properti menyatakan semua kamar memiliki shower hujan. Merusak pengalaman menginap saya. Sebaiknya hindari tempat ini.

text: If you are in Austin, you should be staying here! Can’t beat the price, the rooms are a great size and the place is very well kept. The front desk person that was there on the night of 4/15 was amazing, we couldn’t have asked for better service! I will absolutely be back if I’m ever in Austin again!

title: La Unica Motel
text: I recently relocated to Austin for work, and while saving for a house stayed at La Unica Monday - Thursday for close to 6 months. The rates on this place are lower than anywhere else in Austin, and the other places in their ballpark (mostly motor inns or extended stays) are definitely a lot more questionable and seemingly less clean. The staff here are very firm on their policies, which I appreciated as a single woman staying here alone during the week. You will also receive wonderful customer service, and if anything ever goes wrong (and during my time it hardly ever did) you’ll be taken care of immediately. The rooms are equipped with a fridge, microwave, and and in most instances a freezer too. If you get a room with a shower, let the hot water run a bit before assuming it doesn’t work. Yes the rooms are old, yes it’s a former nursing home. But I’m all my times staying there, I never saw one insect, dirty sheet, anything. The gal who does housekeeping does a wonderful job. Linens were always clean, and crisp. The location is great - right between mopac, 183 and i35. The parking lot is well lit, fenced, and has security cameras everywhere. The people who own and run this facility truly care about their guests, and the experience they provide. What might appear as a little rough around the edges on the inside is truly a wonderful place. And lives up to its name as it is certainly very unique! Very highly recommend La Unica not only if you’re on a budget, but just because of the great customer service.
textTranslated: Saya baru-baru ini pindah ke Austin untuk bekerja, dan sambil menabung untuk membeli rumah, saya menginap di La Unica dari Senin hingga Kamis selama hampir 6 bulan. Tarif di tempat ini lebih rendah daripada tempat lain di Austin, dan tempat-tempat lain di sekitarnya (kebanyakan penginapan motor atau penginapan jangka panjang) jelas jauh lebih meragukan dan tampaknya kurang bersih. Staf di sini sangat tegas dengan kebijakan mereka, yang saya hargai sebagai wanita lajang yang menginap sendirian di sini selama hari kerja. Anda juga akan menerima layanan pelanggan yang luar biasa, dan jika ada sesuatu yang salah (dan selama saya menginap di sana hampir tidak pernah terjadi), Anda akan segera ditangani. Kamar-kamar dilengkapi dengan kulkas, microwave, dan dalam kebanyakan kasus juga freezer. Jika Anda mendapatkan kamar dengan shower, biarkan air panas mengalir sedikit sebelum berasumsi bahwa shower tidak berfungsi. Ya, kamar-kamarnya memang tua, ya, ini dulunya panti jompo. Tetapi selama saya menginap di sana, saya tidak pernah melihat satu serangga pun, seprai kotor, atau apa pun. Wanita yang bertugas sebagai petugas kebersihan melakukan pekerjaannya dengan sangat baik. Seprai selalu bersih dan rapi. Lokasinya sangat bagus - tepat di antara Mopac, 183, dan i35. Tempat parkirnya terang, berpagar, dan memiliki kamera keamanan di mana-mana. Para pemilik dan pengelola fasilitas ini benar-benar peduli pada tamu mereka dan pengalaman yang mereka berikan. Apa yang mungkin tampak sedikit kasar di bagian dalam sebenarnya adalah tempat yang luar biasa. Dan sesuai dengan namanya karena memang sangat unik! Sangat merekomendasikan La Unica bukan hanya jika Anda memiliki anggaran terbatas, tetapi juga karena layanan pelanggan yang luar biasa.
