title: Express Employment Professionals
text: If you're looking for unresponsiveness and unprofessionalism, look no further than Express Employment. They initially contacted me about a position I applied for online and wanted to know more about my willingness to travel. Promises of a call back within a couple of days? Pure fiction. A week went by with radio silence. When I took the initiative to call, the receptionist transferred me to the recruiter, who apparently was always "out of the office" every time I called. After being left on hold for 5 minutes, I was told to leave a voicemail. This ridiculous cycle happened several more times, with not a single return call. I finally gave up on this circus and applied on Indeed, landing a job within a week. Seriously, this temp agency is nothing more than a speed bump. They're supposed to help you find a job, but I did that all by myself, thank you very much. If you enjoy being ignored by unprofessional and lazy staff, then maybe this place is for you. Otherwise, skip the hassle and go straight to Indeed.
textTranslated: Jika Anda mencari ketidakresponsifan dan ketidakprofesionalan, tidak perlu mencari lagi selain Express Employment. Awalnya mereka menghubungi saya tentang posisi yang saya lamar secara online dan ingin tahu lebih banyak tentang kesediaan saya untuk bepergian. Janji akan dihubungi kembali dalam beberapa hari? Benar-benar bohong. Seminggu berlalu tanpa kabar. Ketika saya berinisiatif menelepon, resepsionis mengalihkan saya ke perekrut, yang tampaknya selalu "di luar kantor" setiap kali saya menelepon. Setelah menunggu selama 5 menit, saya disuruh meninggalkan pesan suara. Siklus konyol ini terjadi beberapa kali lagi, tanpa satu pun panggilan balik. Akhirnya saya menyerah pada sirkus ini dan melamar di Indeed, dan mendapatkan pekerjaan dalam waktu seminggu. Serius, agen tenaga kerja sementara ini hanyalah penghalang. Mereka seharusnya membantu Anda menemukan pekerjaan, tetapi saya melakukannya sendiri, terima kasih banyak. Jika Anda menikmati diabaikan oleh staf yang tidak profesional dan malas, mungkin tempat ini cocok untuk Anda. Jika tidak, lewati kerumitan ini dan langsung saja ke Indeed.

text: First, I want to say that Maria was fantastic! friendly, informative, and genuinely helpful throughout our stay. The staff overall was 10/10. Unfortunately, the hotel itself was the complete opposite. The room photos online are very misleading and do not accurately represent what you actually get. Our first room had a broken air conditioner, was significantly smaller than advertised, and was in poor condition. With two beds in the room, you practically had to climb onto one bed to access the other. The walls were filthy, covered with stains, scuffs, and large patches of missing paint. Overall, the room felt dirty and poorly maintained. Thankfully, the front desk staff was accommodating and moved us to another room. The second room was slightly larger, but still nowhere near what was shown in the photos. The air conditioning worked, which was an improvement, but the room had visible BLACK MOLD. The water pressure was extremely weak, and the hot water was barely warm. The only major positive, aside from the staff, is the location. The hotel is right in Times Square, putting you within walking distance of many of the city’s main attractions and hotspots. Unfortunately, this stay was a total waste of money. Under normal circumstances, I would have checked out and booked a different hotel, but due to circumstances beyond my control, that wasn’t an option. Overall: Staff 10/10, Hotel Rooms 0/10. Great employees and a great location cannot make up for the poor condition, cleanliness issues, misleading room photos, and overall disappointing experience.

text: Me and my wife stayed here for 7 nights for our honeymoon. New York was number 1 on both of our bucket list. As the trip grew closer we read many negative reviews about the hotel. Our main concern was the security deposit not being refunded. The hotel took $400 (for our 7 night stay) as a refundable security deposit which was on hold for the whole duration of our trip. On the final day they took out the fees/taxes from that $400 and the remaining amount was refunded to me literally moments after we checked out. This was stated by the receptionist when I checked in, so I have zero complaints about that. Our room was small but very clean when we arrived, the cleaners cleaned the room often (you can put the do not disturb tag on the door if you don’t want your room cleaned). The room was more than ok for us both, the air con was ok but did turn off after a while of no motion in the room, so the room can get a bit warm. We were both more than satisfied with our room. One small thing I would say to improve the hotel, would be to allow guests to use the stairs going up from the lobby, you can only use them coming down, the two lifts can get busy so using the stairs to go up to your room would be ideal in those situations. The staff were professional, polite and helpful. And the location is unbelievable, a minute walk from Times Square, the central perk coffee shop is next door but one. There’s also an ATM and vending machines in the hotel lobby. Our trip to New York was a dream, Thank you OYO for a great stay and for being a part of that.
textTranslated: Saya dan istri saya menginap di sini selama 7 malam untuk bulan madu kami. New York adalah nomor 1 dalam daftar keinginan kami berdua. Saat perjalanan semakin dekat, kami membaca banyak ulasan negatif tentang hotel ini. Kekhawatiran utama kami adalah uang jaminan yang tidak dikembalikan. Hotel mengambil $400 (untuk masa inap 7 malam kami) sebagai uang jaminan yang dapat dikembalikan dan ditahan selama seluruh durasi perjalanan kami. Pada hari terakhir, mereka memotong biaya/pajak dari $400 tersebut dan jumlah yang tersisa dikembalikan kepada saya beberapa saat setelah kami check-out. Hal ini dinyatakan oleh resepsionis saat saya check-in, jadi saya tidak memiliki keluhan sama sekali tentang hal itu. Kamar kami kecil tetapi sangat bersih saat kami tiba, petugas kebersihan sering membersihkan kamar (Anda dapat memasang tanda "jangan ganggu" di pintu jika Anda tidak ingin kamar Anda dibersihkan). Kamar itu lebih dari cukup untuk kami berdua, AC berfungsi dengan baik tetapi mati setelah beberapa saat tidak ada pergerakan di dalam kamar, sehingga kamar bisa agak hangat. Kami berdua sangat puas dengan kamar kami. Satu hal kecil yang ingin saya sampaikan untuk meningkatkan hotel ini adalah mengizinkan tamu menggunakan tangga dari lobi ke atas. Tangga hanya bisa digunakan saat turun, karena kedua lift bisa penuh sehingga menggunakan tangga untuk naik ke kamar akan ideal dalam situasi tersebut. Stafnya profesional, sopan, dan membantu. Dan lokasinya luar biasa, hanya satu menit berjalan kaki dari Times Square, kedai kopi Central Perk berada di sebelah hotel. Ada juga ATM dan mesin penjual otomatis di lobi hotel. Perjalanan kami ke New York seperti mimpi, terima kasih OYO atas pengalaman menginap yang menyenangkan dan telah menjadi bagian dari itu.

One small thing I would say to improve the hotel, would be to allow guests to use the stairs going up from the lobby, you can only use them coming down, the two lifts can get busy so using the stairs to go up to your room would be ideal in those situations. The front desk could not move our room as they were fully booked, and refused to provide any sort of redress such as a temporary refund or more than 2 miniature sized fans. Please find yourself a nicer place to stay a few blocks away from Times Square if visiting… trust me it’s worth the extra money coming from a frequent visitor of NYC.
